Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Set Aside Default And Default Judgment
Off Calendar Jan-26-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT MOBILE AIRWAVES AND STEVE LANDMAN Motion To Set Set Aside Default And Default Judgment.
APPEARANCES: John J. Glugoski, Esq. (415) 983-0900 of Righetti and Wynne for Plaintiff and Opposing Party; Robert Zimmerman, Esq. Robert Zimmerman, CEO Mobile Airways, (650) 855-9367 for Defendant and Moving Party.
Ruling: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling - Deny, untimely under CCP 473. Prevailing party to prepare order. (302/REQ/HE) REPORTER: BELDON YEE CSR #2647

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Sep-14-2004 Discharged

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Aug-31-2004 Continued To Sep-14-04 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 612

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-27-2004 Off Calendar

Default Prove Up In Scd.
Off Calendar May-11-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Leticia Perez.
John Glugoski, Esq., for Plaintiffs: Kevin Avoy, Ryan Campagna, Tae Joon Chae, John Evans, Nicholas Marini, Henry Park, Raffi Tutundijian, Alisha Waddington and Max Waddington.
After hearing the evidence presented, plaintiff's declarations, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiffs and against the defendant: Mobile Airwaves, a California Corporation and Steve Landman as follows:
Principal in the sum of $265,040.07
Interest in the sum of $43,510.73
Costs of $405.00
For the total of $308,955.80
Judgment signed in open court.
